steps.t: Glóin is at his camp in the Western Bruinen Source area of the Misty Mountains. Spalvi has asked you to learn what you can from Glóin about the expedi…
Glóin has told you of the Iron Garrison that seeks to gain entrance to Khazad-dûm, and now you should speak with Spalvi just outside the camp to form …
Spalvi has agreed to travel with you to Gwingris, the ruins in the north-west corner of Eregion, on the next leg of your journey to find Bingo Boffin.
You have made the wilds of Eregion more safe for the Elves at Gwingris, and should return to Spalvi with news of your success.
Haley Meadowsweet has come to the ruins of Gwingris, in north-western Eregion, and wishes to speak with you.
Theodore Gorse is hiding from half-orcs in the middle of the ruins of Pembar, in Eregion.
Haley Meadowsweet is at Gwingris, in north-western Eregion.
Spalvi is at Gwingris, in north-western Eregion, and is waiting to speak to you.
